overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Ravenclaw student exploring the house common room, ascending to the dormitory, and entering the bathroom. The character walks through gothic interiors with blue and stone color palettes, interacting with the environment by opening doors and examining spaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ravenclaw common room with eagle mural and gothic windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room past seated students toward the staircase

notable_agents.action: two students sitting on a sofa engaged in conversation

entered.detail: large stone wall with intricate eagle mosaic, house symbol of Ravenclaw
tall pointed arch windows with diamond lattice panes letting in daylight
ornate blue rug covering the stone floor with house colors
dark wooden spiral staircase leading upward to dormitories

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the Ravenclaw common room, a grand gothic space with high vaulted ceilings and tall arched windows. The iconic eagle mural dominates the far wall while students relax on sofas to the right. The camera moves steadily across blue carpets toward a wooden staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow spiral staircase with stone walls

events.description: character enters the spiral staircase from the common room

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden spiral staircase to the upper dormitory level

entered.detail: tight wooden spiral stairs with worn steps and handrail
rough-hewn grey stone blocks with wooden wainscoting
medieval-style lantern sconces providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow enclosed spiral staircase with stone walls and wooden steps. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the tight space as the camera follows the winding path upward, leaving the common room behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ravenclaw dormitory with bunk beds and blue drapery

events.description: character enters the dormitory room from the staircase

agents.ego_description: walking around the dormitory examining the bunk beds and furnishings

entered.detail: wooden bunk beds with blue canopy curtains and house banners
heavy blue fabric drapes around the bed frames
ornate wooden bed with blue curtains in the corner
small study desk with chair near the window

segments.scene_description: The character enters a quiet dormitory with tall gothic windows and blue drapery. The room contains bunk beds with house-colored canopies, a four-poster bed, and study desks. The camera pans around the space, showing the sleeping quarters before heading back toward the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase descending to lower level

events.description: character exits the dormitory and re-enters the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking down the spiral staircase toward the bathroom

entered.detail: same wooden spiral staircase now descending downward

segments.scene_description: The character descends the same spiral staircase, leaving the dormitory behind. The enclosed stone passage with wooden steps leads downward, illuminated by wall sconces, heading toward a different area of the tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic bathroom with multiple sinks and clawfoot tubs

events.description: character enters the bathroom from the staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the bathroom examining the sinks and mirrors

entered.detail: row of white porcelain sinks with brass fixtures and ornate cabinetry
rectangular mirrors with dark wooden frames above each sink
vintage white bathtubs with red curtains for privacy
green painted wooden toilet stall doors with decorative trim
large cylindrical stone pillars supporting the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large bathroom with stone tile floors and warm artificial lighting. The space features multiple sinks with mirrors, clawfoot tubs with privacy curtains, and stone columns. The camera moves along the sink counter, showing the reflections and fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: bathroom stalls with green wooden doors

events.description: character opens and enters a bathroom stall

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a bathroom stall

entered.detail: enclosed toilet stall with green wooden door and walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward the bathroom stalls at the far end of the room. The green painted wooden stall doors become prominent as the sinks recede. The character opens one of the stall doors and steps inside the small enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the grand, open scale of the Ravenclaw common room through narrow stone passages and into the intimate quarters of the tower. It begins by gliding across blue carpets and beneath vaulted ceilings toward a wooden staircase, leaving the eagle mural and lounging students behind. As the camera ascends a tight, sconce-lit spiral staircase, the space constricts before opening into a quiet dormitory filled with blue-canopied beds and gothic windows. The scene then shifts as the camera winds back down the stone stairs and enters a large bathroom characterized by stone tile floors, clawfoot tubs, and warm artificial lighting. Finally, the movement flows along a mirrored sink counter toward the far end of the room, where the camera enters a small enclosed space through a green wooden stall door.
